recoder.kit.transformation
 
recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.
recoder.parser
 
recoder.service

    Description
    AnnotationUseSpecification
    Use of an annotation, usually within a declaration.
    ClassDeclaration
    Outer or inner class declaration.
    ClassInitializer
    Class initializer.
    ConstructorDeclaration
    The getTypeReference method returns null - constructors do not have explicit return types.

    ParameterDeclaration
    Formal parameters require a VariableSpecificationList of size() <= 1 (size() == 0 for abstract methods) without initializer (for Java).

    Variable specification that defines a variable name.
